name: Enhanced Treaty-Based Unified Credit

eligibility.description: Available to nonresident non-citizens who are residents of countries with specific tax treaties with the U.S. (e.g., Canada, Germany, UK) that allow for a proportional unified credit.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows certain nonresident non-citizens to claim a prorated portion of the full U.S. citizen unified credit (rather than just $13,000) based on the ratio of U.S. assets to global assets.
